---
title: "ravens.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\skills\ravens.py"
loc: 108
complexity: 12
logic_score: 1.77
style_score: 3.53
intel_score: 5.84
overall_score: 2.31
---

## Intent
The `ravens.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on _get_running_pids, check_status, recall_ravens, release_ravens, learn, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via _get_running_pids, check_status, recall_ravens, release_ravens, learn, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [os](file://os)

### Exports
- `_get_running_pids`
- `check_status`
- `recall_ravens`
- `release_ravens`
- `learn`
- `main`
